title: First-week schedule
content: New hires should complete HR paperwork on Monday, security training by Wednesday, and role-specific setup with their manager by Friday.

title: Laptop and account access
content: IT provisions laptops, email, VPN, Slack, and Jira access. If access is missing, open a helpdesk ticket and copy your manager.

title: Benefits enrollment
content: Benefits must be selected within 30 days of your start date. HR hosts a live benefits Q&A every Tuesday at 10:00.

title: Office badge and facilities
content: Facilities issues office badges after identity verification. Temporary badges are available at reception for the first two days.
